theme_and_archetype.description: Cinematic, moody, expensive feel. Emphasizes visual storytelling with large immersive photography, generous spacing, and an editorial layout.

rules: No generic defaults like Inter or Roboto for headings.
Headlines (Size > 32px) MUST use tight letter spacing: tracking-tight.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Line Height: Tight (leading-none) for headers, Loose (leading-relaxed) for body.

heading.description: Elegant serif for editorial, high-end feel.

body.description: Clean, geometric modern sans for readability and contrast.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-heading font-light tracking-tight
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-heading font-light tracking-tight
scales.label: text-xs font-body uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-gray-400

spacing_and_layout.generous_spacing: Use p-8, p-12, p-16, py-24 to create breathing room.

grids.marketing: Asymmetric Bento Grids. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
grids.dashboard: Control Room Grid. Base Grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Dense but clear.

spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align paragraphs and dense content. Center-align hero headings only if visually balanced.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Max-width 7xl (max-w-7xl) for main content, full bleed for hero images.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black font-body font-medium px-8 py-3 rounded-none hover:bg-[#E5C158] transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white font-body px-8 py-3 rounded-none hover:border-white/60 transition-colors duration-300

forms.inputs: Use Shadcn Input, but heavily customized. Strip borders except bottom, or use 1px solid border-white/10 with bg-black/40. Focus states MUST highlight with #D4AF37.
forms.calendar: Shadcn Calendar. Dark theme override. Selected date bg-[#D4AF37] text-black.

cards.room_card: Flat background (#141414), 1px subtle border (border-white/5), no rounded corners (rounded-none). Image wrapper overflow-hidden with scale on hover.

navigation.header: Sticky top-0 z-50. Use Crystal Glassmorphism surface. Must have logo, navigation links, and primary CTA (Book Now).
navigation.footer: Massive space (py-24). Brand statement in large serif, small utility links.

motion.hover: Images scale up slightly (scale-105) over 0.5s ease. Buttons translate-y-[-2px] with increased shadow.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for list items. Framer Motion recommended.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based.

hero.description: Minimalist classic hotel facade against a dark dramatic sky. Use for Main Homepage Hero.

rooms.description: Stylish bedroom with brick wall and ambient lighting.
Dark ambient hotel room with bed and soft lighting through curtains.
White bed with gray pillow, luxurious suite feel.

experiences.description: Dark atmospheric restaurant table setup. Use for Dining/Experience section.

home.layout: Hero Section (Full bleed image, large serif heading, subtle scroll indicator) -> Sticky Booking Bar (Dates, Guests, Check Availability) -> Editorial Room Highlights (Bento grid of 3 rooms) -> Experience/Dining Section -> Footer.

search_and_rooms.layout: List view with large images. Left side: Filters (Category, Price). Right side: Room Cards. Room cards should be horizontal with image on left, details and price on right.

booking_details.layout: Two-column layout. Left: Room Image, Details, Amenities, Review ratings. Right: Sticky Summary Card with Dates, Price Breakdown, and Stripe Payment CTA.

user_dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid. Sidebar navigation. Main area: List of current and past bookings. Ability to Cancel reservation with a styled dialog.

admin_dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid. Stats overview (Revenue, Occupancy). Data tables for Bookings and Rooms. Add/Edit room modal.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Strictly follow the Dark Theme and Luxury Archetype. Do not use pure white backgrounds anywhere.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Use Tailwind classes: bg-[#0A0A0A] for main background, text-[#F8F9FA] for primary text, text-[#D4AF37] for accents.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: For UI components, use Shadcn but heavily customize them. Remove heavy rounded corners (use rounded-none or max rounded-sm).
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Integrate React Router for navigation. Ensure pages are created using .js extensions (not .tsx) as per user environment.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Implement Stripe payment simulation using a simple mocked flow or Stripe Elements if API key is provided.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Store bookings and room availability using an SQLite database (OOP + DB) or a structured JSON file per the requirement.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Ensure EVERY interactive element (button, link, input) has a unique data-testid attribute for testing.
instructions_to_main_agent.8: For Icons, install and use @phosphor-icons/react for a high-end, thin duotone look.
instructions_to_main_agent.9: Include the Google Fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Outfit) in the main index.html or global CSS.
